mapper.select: SELECT d.* FROM department d ORDER BY d.sort_order, d.created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO department (id, name, parent_id, head_user_id, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{dept.id}, #{dept.name}, #{dept.parentId}, #{dept.headUserId}, #{dept.sortOrder}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE department SET head_user_id = #{headUserId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT head_user_id FROM department WHERE id = #{id}
